adminNote:
SKIPPED 2026-05-25 — onboarding blocked at IKEA CDN routing, NOT a config issue.

What works:
- Listing data is fully extractable. First scrape returned 104/115 jobs with title, location, department, jobScope, detailUrl, externalJobId all populated (5/5 on samples).
- All 115 job rows are rendered into the DOM in a single page load (client-side pagination just toggles display:none on 109 of them). itemSelector '.job-wrapper' picks them all up.

What does NOT work:
- Detail pages always come back http_error from the worker (rawData._detailNavStatus = http_error on all 115). IKEA's CDN serves '/il/he/webapp-local/work-with-us/job/job-details?id=X' as the outer IKEA 404 SPA shell (HTTP 404, ~134KB 'לא ניתן למצוא את העמוד' body) to direct/top-level navigation. The Yii2 backend only routes correctly when the URL is loaded inside the iframe context on the parent page.
- During this onboarding the CDN also began returning 404 to the listing URL itself from our Playwright/curl traffic — likely IP-level rate limiting on the scraper egress after the burst of requests. Verified with both Playwright (status 404, title 'לא ניתן למצוא את העמוד') and curl (status 404, 134594-byte SPA shell), even with proper UA, Referer, Sec-Fetch-* headers.

Canonical listing URL (Select-All-on-both-filters form submission, what a human user generates):
https://www.ikea.com/il/he/webapp-local/work-with-us/job/search-results?Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=1&Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=2&Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=3&Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=4&Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=5&Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=6&Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=7&Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=8&Search%5Bstore%5D%5B%5D=9&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=22&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=29&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=46&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=47&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=48&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=49&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=50&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=51&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=52&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=53&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=54&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=55&Search%5BprofessionalField%5D%5B%5D=56&search-button=

Proven-working config (kept in place, just status=SKIPPED): listingSelector='.search-results-wrapper', itemSelector='.job-wrapper', listing-side fields title/location/department/jobScope/detailUrl/externalJobId, pageFlow has 2 entries with the canonical Select-All listing URL above. Description/applicationInfo intentionally omitted (only available on detail pages, which aren't reachable).

To re-enable:
1. Try again from a different scraper egress IP (or wait 24-48h for IKEA's CDN block to expire), then PATCH status back to ACTIVE.
2. If detail-page enrichment is required: needs a worker-side change to load detail URLs inside the parent page's iframe context (with Sec-Fetch-Dest=iframe + parent session cookies). Today's worker can't do that.
